title: Choose the size images are displayed in the column 'file' with a 'slider' or number field
excerpt:
It would be a great feature where you can control the size of image files displayed in the file column. If enabled, this feature turns the thumbnails into real images and the size is controled by a slider element.

posts.author: Wil1 (William)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be a great feature where you can control the size of image files displayed in the file column. If enabled, this feature turns the thumbnails into real images and the size is controled by a slider element.

This feature allows us to make full tabled reports direct from the default board view.
